phase: Phase 12 run #42 government deduplication gate hotfix
root_cause: Safe duplicate consolidation across full and department-specific government circular PDFs was incorrectly counted as destructive data loss.
changes: Government vacancies are excluded from broad semantic and content-hash deduplication.
Government identity uses stable ID or country, institution, advert reference and title.
Safe duplicate consolidation and destructive loss are reported separately.
The 5 percent certification threshold applies only to destructive or unexplained government loss.
